item.title: Line-Scan Imaging and Illumination in Modern Machine Vision
item.description: This overview details how line-scan cameras and specialized illumination solve high-speed, continuous-web inspection challenges in modern industrial machine vision applications.

item.title: Why AI in Manufacturing Fails Without Quality Data
item.description: This article discusses the critical importance of high-quality data foundations for achieving measurable enterprise-level impacts from AI deployments in manufacturing environments.

item.title: ADLINK eyes doube-digit growth - Taipei Times
item.description: ADLINK Technology projects double-digit growth, highlighting market trends in industrial machine vision and automated optical inspection.

item.title: JAI Single-Sensor Visible + SWIR Area Scan Camera
item.description: JAI expands its hardware offerings with a new single-sensor visible and SWIR area scan camera for commercial machine vision applications.

item.title: Automated Optical Inspection Market Size, Share, Growth, 2034 - Straits Research
item.description: New market report predicts significant growth and expanding market size for automated optical inspection technologies through 2034.

item.title: 8k Camera for Ultra-High-Speed Imaging in Low-Light Conditions Launched
item.description: Teledyne DALSA announces the release of a next-generation 8k BSI TDI camera designed to advance ultra-high-speed machine vision imaging.

item.title: Waygate Unveils Future-Ready Krautkrämer PAXYS Platform for Industrial NDT
item.description: Waygate Technologies launches a new portable phased array platform tailored for non-destructive testing and industrial infrastructure inspection.
